users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: View list, search, and assign system permissions

errors.FORBIDDEN_ACCESS: You do not have permission to access this feature!
errors.fetch_failed: Error occurred while fetching user list!

messages.server_error: Server connection error! Please try again later.
messages.update_error_log: Error while saving data to backend:
messages.USER_NOT_FOUND: This user could not be found in the system!
messages.SERVER_ERROR: Internal server error. Please try again later!
messages.INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid or expired session. Please log in again!
messages.UNAUTHORIZED: You do not have permission to perform this action!
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user? This action cannot be undone!
messages.confirm_lock_desc: Locked accounts will be unable to sign in or shop on the system. Please select a violation reason:
messages.lock_success: User account has been locked successfully!
messages.unlock_success: User account has been unlocked and reactivated successfully!
messages.confirm_unlock_desc: Are you sure you want to reactivate this account? The user will be able to sign in normally again.

reasons.policy_violation: Violating system general terms and policies
